title: Zoolion Weekly Pill Box 7 Day 3 Times a Day (Morn/noon/Night), Daily Portable Travel Pill Box Organiser, Tablet Organiser with Large Compartments, Hold for Fish Oils, Vitamins, Supplements (Black)
features: [Large Capacity]: Zoolion weekly pill box with 3 large compartments a day, Each separate compartment can hold 8 fish oils or 11 tablets for daily use.
[BPA Free pill organiser]: Our 7-day pill box organiser is be made of food-grade materials, healthy and odorless. It is safe for daily and medical use.

[Conspicuous Remind]: Adopts UV printing technology. 7 individual colorful dosset boxes organize medicine 3 times a day from morning to evening, the printing of days of the week makes it easier to distinguish for the old and child. Remind you to take pills on time to accurately manage your health.
[Easy to Carry]: A good ideal tablet organiser for travel and work, it is very convenient to put it in your handbag or pocket, Let you care your health even wherever you are.
[Simple and Durable]: It is easy to open for kids or arthritis elderly. The tablet organiser with double protection is not easy to fall, Tight and Durable. You can be used with confidence.
